Motion For Order Transferring Venue To Contra Costa County
Off Calendar Dec-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT LIBERTY BUSINESS ADVISORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. MOTION FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING VENUE TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY is GRANTED. Moving party to prepare an order. No opposition filed. In the future the parties are advised to familiarize themselves with the local rules in order to expedite the process by submitting proper filings and courtesy copies to the appropriate departments.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2023 Continued To Jan-24-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Order Transferring Venue To Contra Costa County
Off Calendar Dec-07-2023 Continued To Dec-19-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LIBERTY BUSINESS ADVISORS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'s Motion For Order Transferring Venue To Contra Costa County.

Transferred to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on December 19, 2023. That department handles all real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than December 8, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. , Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
